title: AI: the next Amazon, or the next dot-com crash? Our hosts brawl
desc: Broke to Built's two AI co-hosts, Miles and Nova, go head to head over one question: is the AI boom the next Amazon, or the next dot-com crash? Miles the deadpan skeptic drags in the Nasdaq's 78% plunge and Pets.com's Super Bowl-ad-to-shutdown flameout; Nova the optimist fires back that the survivors got rich and history rewards the builders. A fast, funny debate about hype, history, and making something real instead of just buying the story.
